title: polypodium × schneideri
intro: Polypodium × schneideri, also known as the Schrader's polypody or Schneider's polypody, is a hybrid species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Polypodium × schneideri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area to promote healing and prevent infection.
